justification: Trace the outbound connection establishment path — core to understanding proxy behavior
Find protocol handler and feature registration points — reveals plugin/extension architecture
Locate HTTP handler implementations — entry points for inbound HTTP/HTTPS traffic
Understand configuration parsing — how JSON/TOML config maps to internal structures
Find handler constructors across proxy protocols — shows factory patterns and DI wiring
Core packet/connection processing pipeline — the main data-plane flow for any proxy protocol
Locate logging infrastructure — understand access log format, structured fields, and log levels
Find traffic dispatcher logic — how connections are routed from inbound to outbound handlers
Locate protocol header parsing — reveals wire format for VMess, VLESS, Trojan, etc.
Find dynamic user management — how users are added/removed at runtime without restart
